# Description

<!-- What does this change, and why? If it fixes an open issue, link it. -->

Fixes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor or internal cleanup

## Checklist

- [ ] `php artisan test` passes locally
- [ ] `vendor/bin/pint --preset psr12 --dirty` has been run
- [ ] Tests were added or updated for the behavior being changed
- [ ] Any new or changed database structure includes a migration
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` has been updated, if this is user-facing

## Contribution terms

- [ ] I have read the [contribution terms](../LICENSE.md#5-feedback-and-contributions) and agree that my contribution is licensed under Section 5 of the AdAstra Alpha Evaluation License, including the grant permitting relicensing under future terms.
- [ ] This contribution is my own original work, or is properly attributed and compatible with that grant.
